zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：震荡整理略偏多
zh.content:
当前ADA/USD整体处于窄幅震荡格局，价格围绕0.154附近波动，日内虽小幅下跌但未破关键支撑，短线仍保持整理结构，趋势略偏震荡偏多。

技术指标方面，MACD仍为正值显示短期动能略偏多，但缺乏RSI参考。价格站上SMA20均线，说明中短期均线结构偏多，动能仍在修复中。

上方阻力关注0.1557及0.1580一带，若放量突破有望延续反弹。下方支撑在0.1539及0.1529附近，跌破则转弱。短线区间震荡为主。

操作建议以区间交易为主，低位接近支撑可轻仓试多，高位接近阻力逐步止盈，严格控制仓位，避免追涨杀跌。短线以稳健为主控制风险。

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ADA/USD is consolidating after a mild intraday pullback, currently trading near 0.154, holding above the short-term SMA(20) at 0.1529. Price action shows a tight compression between recent high and low, suggesting equilibrium between buyers and sellers. Despite a slight 1% decline, structure remains constructive as higher lows are being defended within a narrow ascending range over the last sessions overall.

MACD remains in positive territory at 0.0021, indicating modest bullish momentum despite the lack of a visible signal line value. Price stability above SMA(20) reinforces short-term strength, while momentum appears to be gradually rebuilding after prior compression. Without RSI data, overbought or oversold conditions cannot be confirmed, but current structure suggests a neutral-to-slightly bullish momentum bias overall in the short term.

Immediate support is located at the session low near 0.1539, with stronger structural support aligned with the SMA(20) at 0.1529. A break below this zone could expose deeper retracement pressure. On the upside, resistance is defined near 0.1557, where recent highs have repeatedly capped price advances, forming a tight intraday range. Market participants are likely to watch for breakout confirmation above resistance.

In the current environment, range-bound strategies may be more effective, favoring buys near support and partial profit-taking into resistance. Risk management is essential, with stops placed below the SMA(20) to avoid breakdown exposure. A confirmed breakout above 0.1557 could shift bias toward renewed upside momentum, while failure to hold 0.1539 may signal short-term weakness. Traders should remain patient and reactive rather than predictive in the near term.
